title.en: But at this time, Ye Tian's other copy body mad...

content.en:
Rumble!!!

Ye Tian appeared, casting the third sequence of Dao Divine Powers, bombarding this group of Dao Void Demons.

Ye Tian's strength is so strong, if these Supreme Dao Void Demons use all their means, they will still be able to compete with him.

But at this moment, they were all injured, and the hole cards were almost used, so naturally they couldn't stop Ye Tian.

Bang bang bang!!

A Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon at the pinnacle of the Dao Realm was shattered.

"Run!"

The remaining Supreme Dao Void Demons knew that they were not Ye Tian's opponents, so they wanted to escape.

But the dense third sequence of supreme rules shrouded all around, blocking their way.

Burst!

A Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon with a supreme bloodline was pierced through his body by Ye Tian's Nine Patterns Supreme Dao spear, killing him with one blow.

However, there is still a Supreme Void Demon who has broken the blockade and is about to escape.

But at this time, Ye Tian's other copy body made a move and stopped them.

Then there is the third replica body.

Three replica bodies were enough to deal with them, so that all the Supreme Void Demons could not escape.

A short time later, these Supreme Dao Void Demons all died at Ye Tian's hands.

"After dying so many Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons, I'm afraid that the Extreme Dao Void Demon side is going crazy!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, the Supreme Dao Void Demon launched an invasion and created a catastrophe, just wanting to cultivate a Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon with a supreme bloodline!

As a result, this time, the Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon of the Supreme Bloodline fell by three people.

"You can't kill too much in the future, otherwise the Supreme Dao Void Demon side will attack the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and it's me who is unlucky!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He collected all the items on the Void Demon and slew the legendary creature.

After that, he scraped up some more resources around here before going back.

......

"There are so many low-quality third-order Supreme Dao rule items on these Supreme Dao Void Demons!"

He took a look, there were about a hundred low-quality third-order supreme rule items, which should be their inventory, and they were all put on their bodies, but they were killed by Ye Tian at one time and became Ye Tian's trophies.

"That's right, with so many third-order supreme rule items, and then there are third-order supreme rule items of the Immortal Emperor, there is almost no shortage of them!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian gradually slaughtered a hundred legendary-level creatures, and successively exchanged three thousand third-order Dao rule items from the Immortal Emperor.

Of course, all of them are the lowest quality third order supreme rules, not even a single medium quality one.

"The Immortal Emperor is really powerful, he has gathered so many third-order supreme Dao rule items, and it is estimated that he has paid a great price!" Ye Tian guessed.

And after obtaining a hundred copies of the blood of legends, the Immortal Emperor Su Changsheng used special means to leave the legendary world.

Sioux Domain.

Su Changsheng came back and met the patriarch of the Su clan, Su Yuan, for the first time.

"I've seen the ancestor!"

Su Changsheng said respectfully.

"Changsheng, have you gathered a hundred pieces of Legendary Blood?" asked Su Yuan.

"Yes, Ancestor, I am willing to donate this hundred pieces of legendary blood to the Sioux Clan, please Ancestor can help me please move the Thirteenth Elder to heal my foundation wounds. Su Changsheng pleaded.

"It's hard for you, in order to get together this hundred pieces of legendary blood, you have almost exhausted your entire net worth, and you still owe a bunch of favors, right?"

Su Changsheng nodded slightly, but did not speak.

As Su Yuan said, he did pay a great price, and owed too many favors, and even owed too much arrears, but as long as the foundation was restored, he could quickly break through to the Legendary Dao Realm.

When the time comes, he can slowly repay those arrears.

"Let's go, I'll take you to the Thirteenth Elder!"

He promised this matter, and naturally he would not regret it.

"Thank you, Ancestor!"

Su Changsheng was excited.

Wow!

Su Yuan took Su Changsheng to shuttle continuously, left the Su Domain, and soon came to the headquarters of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

It is located in a special void, and only a few high-level people can enter it.

Airplanes!

Su Yuan took Su Changsheng to the palace of the thirteenth patriarch.

"Brother Su, come in!"

The palace gates open.

Su Yuan and Su Changsheng walked in.

The Thirteenth Patriarch is a woman with a similar appearance to a human being, and with human aesthetics, the Thirteenth Patriarch is undoubtedly a beauty.

"I've seen the Thirteenth Elder!"

Su Yuan said respectfully.

In terms of status, he was far inferior to the Thirteenth Elder, but he belonged to the oldest group of Elders in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and he was already a Patriarch before the Thirteenth Elder was born.

It's just that the thirteenth patriarch is too demonic, and now he has surpassed him and won the title of the thirteenth patriarch.

This also means that the thirteenth patriarch ranks thirteenth in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and his strength is about the same.

As for the original name of the thirteenth patriarch, it has been too long since anyone mentioned it.

"Brother Su, do you want me to heal the wounds of your descendant's foundation?" the thirteenth elder asked.

"Yes, and ask the Thirteenth Elder to help. Su Yuan pleaded.

"Yes!" the Thirteenth Elder nodded, "But you need to prepare the Gyokuro Dao Liquid, otherwise even I won't be able to repair his foundation perfectly." "

"Thirteenth Elder, this is the Yulu Dao Liquid!"

Su Yuan took out a drop of Jade Dew Dao Liquid and handed it to the Thirteenth Elder.

Only then did Su Changsheng understand that the Ancestor was afraid that he had already prepared it, otherwise he would not have taken out the Jade Dew Dao Liquid immediately.

Airplanes!

The thirteenth elder made a move, she stretched out her slender jade hand, and with a wave of her hand, the second sequence of supreme dao rules mobilized a special force to merge into the jade dew supreme dao liquid.

Immediately, the Yulu Zhidao liquid turned into a stream of light and merged into Su Changsheng's body.

"Reversal, Kai!"

This is the ancient technique of the thirteenth patriarch - the reversal technique, which can reverse the foundation, but it is relatively expensive and requires a medium.

With the help of the reversal technique, Su Changsheng found that his foundation injury was reversing and recovering little by little.

It didn't take long for his foundation to be completely restored, but at this time, the thirteenth patriarch was a little unstable, obviously a lot of consumption.

"It's like this, thank you Thirteenth Elder!"

Su Changsheng hurriedly said.

"Thank you, Thirteenth Elder, that I will take this descendant of mine with me. "

Su Yuan said.

"Go ahead, I need to rest too!"

The Thirteenth Elder Road.

......

Sioux Domain.

Su Yuan returned here with Su Changsheng, and then said, "Changsheng, let you gather a hundred copies of the blood of legends, and it is also impossible to say anything in the clan." After all, you also know very well that you are not the only one in the Ninefold Dao Realm whose foundation has been injured within the clan, and if they all come to beg me, I can't either. "

"Ancestor, I understand!"

Su Changsheng hurriedly said.

"Let's go and attack the Legend to the Dao Realm!"

Su Yuan waved his hand.

"Yes, Ancestor!"

Su Changsheng stepped back.
